prompt: A cinematic, low-angle shot of a vast, dark, turbulent sea under a heavy, charcoal-grey storm sky. The entire surface of the water, stretching to the horizon, is densely covered with thousands of floating, translucent white shirts and garments, half-submerged like spectral figures. No people are visible. The atmosphere is somber, silent, and haunting. High-detail fabric textures, cold color palette, photorealistic, evocative of a mass memorial, 8k resolution, deep focus.
insight: Over 60,000 migrants have died or gone missing globally since 2014, with the Mediterranean remaining the deadliest route, creating a vast, silent graveyard of interrupted journeys.
